---
applyTo: "requirements/**"
---

# Requirements Context

The files in `requirements/` define the evaluation criteria for the presentation. When generating the presentation, you MUST ensure every criterion is addressed across the slides.

## Criteria Mapping to Slides

| Criterion | Primary Slides | How to Satisfy |
|-----------|---------------|----------------|
| Problem Clarity | Slides 2, 3 | Concrete pain points, relatable scenarios, real statistics |
| Value Articulation | Slides 4, 5, 6 | Connect every feature to a business outcome |
| Microsoft Differentiation | Slides 7, 8, 10 | Head-to-head comparison, enterprise features, ecosystem breadth |
| Storytelling & Flow | All slides | Natural narrative arc, smooth transitions in notes |
| Proof / Credibility | Slides 6, 9 | Named customers, specific metrics, analyst quotes |
| Pitch Readiness | All slides (especially notes) | Professional tone, objection handling, clear CTA |

Every slide's speaker notes must explicitly support at least one criterion.
